description: User clicks Cancel on Google's OAuth consent screen. GET /o/oauth2/v2/auth redirects back to redirect_uri with error=access_denied&error_description=User+denied+access. Your OAuth callback must handle this gracefully: show a clear user-facing message and NOT crash with an unhandled KeyError on 'code'. No accounts or locations are present because the token exchange never happens — accessing them is a bug in your flow.
